titles.title: Getting Used to the Family of God

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Going together, enjoying the trip, Getting used to the fam'ly, I'll spend eternity with, Learning to love you, How easy it is, Getting used to the fam'ly of God

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Climbing the mountain, Crossing the plains, Fording the rivers, Sharing the pain, Sometimes the losses, And sometimes the gains, Getting used to the fam'ly of God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Going together, enjoying the trip, Getting used to the fam'ly, I'll spend eternity with, Learning to love you, How easy it is, Getting used to the fam'ly of God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Reaching our hands, To a brother that's new, Learning to say, That I really love you, Learning to walk, As the Father could do, Getting used to the fam'ly of God

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Going together, enjoying the trip, Getting used to the fam'ly I'll spend eternity with, Learning to love you, How easy it is, Getting used to the fam'ly of God
